# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Strict mode checks
# Table of checks:
#   - no license                               -> warn
#   - vendored path without pedigree            -> warn
#   - purl == ancestor purl                     -> ALWAYS hard error
#   - no hashes                                 -> warn
#   - no distribution URL                       -> warn
#   - type: library without supplier            -> warn
# Under --strict, the warns become errors.
#
# EXPECTED GAPS:
#   - strict.go:118 precedence bug:
#       `c.Type == "library" && name == "" || email == ""`
#     misses parens: any missing email (library or not) is flagged.

# Baseline (no --strict): completes with warnings
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i gappy.json -o out.json
stderr 'has no license'
stderr 'has no hash'
stderr 'has no distribution URL'
stderr 'has no supplier'

# --strict: should fail loudly
! exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i gappy.json --strict -o out_strict.json
stderr 'strict mode validation failed'

# --strict with clean input: passes
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i clean.json --strict -o out_clean.json
exists out_clean.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- gappy.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "gappy", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library" }
  ]
}
-- clean.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "clean", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library",
      "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name": "Acme", "email": "sec@acme.example"},
      "external_references": [{"type":"distribution","url":"https://acme.example/dl/clean"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc"}] }
  ]
}
